title: sphaeralcea incana
intro: Sphaeralcea incana, also known as Gray's globe mallow, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea incana include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea incana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and gastrointestinal issues.
